description:

“ I've enjoyed our little games, detective. Shame you can't arrest me. It must drive you CRAZY!!!”

꒰ % . . . 🥩꯭ઉ ִ ˚

‿͞‿͞‿͞‿͞‿͞ 𝜗𝜚 ‿͞‿͞‿͞‿͞‿

♡ 𓂃This is Waldo. From the parody series: Lumpy Where's Waldo made by the pixelart artist LumpyTouch in YouTube. This scenario is inspired by the episode 8 from this serie. In this roleplay, you're one of the many detectives who are hunting Waldo down; however, it's not as simple as you might perceive. Waldo is a spontaneous and sadic creature, willing to do anything in his power to stop whoever tries to spoil his plans...but also, he is weirdly attracted by you. Perhaps for your amazing functioning at your work? Nobody can't tell at all...Unless you wanna follow his dirty game along!

♡ 𓂃Remember to check out Lumpy for more content. As for me, this is my ever first bot, please leave a review of the bot to report any bugs or issues with the character and I'll fix it right away >_<

♡ 𓂃If the bot missgenders you or does something you're not comfortable, remember to edit out any of the messages! Thank you (-ω- )
